titlestmt.titleproper: Miscellaneous Spanish Painting, Architecture and Sculpture
Miscellaneous Spanish Painting, Architecture and Sculpture
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Robert Carlucci

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 8070025.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday September 1, 2020 at 23:17

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous Spanish Painting, Architecture and Sculpture
did.abstract: Mounted black and white photographs, each labeled Biblioteca Domingo Carles Tolrá, Barcelona; in pencil: name of artist, date, title, collection; Most mounts stamped: "A questa proba es copia d'un negatiu propietat del "ARXIV MAS" i no pot ser reproduida sens permis"; Many photographs indexed to Post (A History of Spanish Painting by Chandler Rathfon Post, 14 v. in 20, Harvard-Radcliffe fine arts series, Cambridge, Mass., Harvard University Press, 1930-66); also 264 undivided miscellaneous Spanish painting, architecture and sculpture.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University. Further use of this material may be subject to the copyright laws of the United States (Title 17, United States Code) or to site license or other rights management terms or conditions.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Miscellaneous Spanish Painting, Architecture and Sculpture

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mounted black and white photographs, each labeled Biblioteca Domingo Carles Tolrá, Barcelona; in pencil: name of artist, date, title, collection; Most mounts stamped: "A questa proba es copia d'un negatiu propietat del "ARXIV MAS" i no pot ser reproduida sens permis"; Many photographs indexed to Post (A History of Spanish Painting by Chandler Rathfon Post, 14 v. in 20, Harvard-Radcliffe fine arts series, Cambridge, Mass., Harvard University Press, 1930-66); also 264 undivided miscellaneous Spanish painting, architecture and sculpture.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: 10 boxes with each artist organized by labeled dividers. Boxes 9 and 10 contain 264 undivided miscellaneous Spanish painting, architecture and sculpture.

did.unittitle: Master of the Cardona Pentecost (11 photographs)
Master of the Solsona Last Supper (24 photographs)
Rizi, Franciso (2 photographs, marked Ford Foundation, Latin American Affairs Council)
Miscellaneous Spanish Painting, Architecture and Sculpture, 14th-17th centuries (126 photographs)
Miscellaneous Spanish Painting and Sculpture, 14th-17th centuries (138 photographs)
